name: Delight-Full Double Deck
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13 pan.
3. Prepare the devil's food cake batter using 1 egg, 1/2 cup oil, and no water. Pour into the prepared pan and bake for 15-18 minutes until dry to touch.
4. Remove the pan from the oven, keeping the oven temperature. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the hot crust. Let stand for 2-3 minutes.
5. Using a metal spatula, smooth the chocolate chips into an even layer. Set aside to cool.
6. Prepare the white cake mix according to package directions. Beat in the drink mix and pour batter over the chocolate crust.
7. Bake for 50-55 minutes until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan.
8. To assemble, loosen the cakes from the pan and invert onto a wire rack. Invert again so that the crust is on the bottom.
9. Spread cream over the top of the cake.
10. Decorate with chopped walnuts and cocoa powder. Serve. Makes 16 servings. Calories: 597
